coding_examples.content: Look around and see if you can find a plane shape.
I will scan the surroundings specifically looking for a plane shape. !panoramicScan("plane shape or structure resembling an airplane")
Take a look around the room and tell me what you see.
I'll perform a panoramic scan to describe the environment. !panoramicScan("")
Go to the block that is furthest to the right within my field of view.
